summary: Iter 255 e2e verification: (a) tooltip text now WHITE on slate-900 bg with NO fly-in animation, (b) popover/tooltip/expanded-filter row open INSTANTLY (animationDuration=0s), (c) Status & Services filters on /admin/operators are 29px icon-only chips when value='all', expand to icon+label with brand-blue (#082c59 = rgb(8,44,89)) when a value is selected, (d) tooltip on active chip shows category-aware label e.g. 'Status: active', (e) sidebar icons no longer carry hover:scale-110, (f) backend integration intact — 7 operators load + filter still returns active rows. All explicit spec points from the request were exercised.
critical_code_review_comments: FilterChipSelect.jsx is clean: tooltip+popover combo wired via asChild so both Radix triggers share the same button — good DRY. Auto-derived data-testid (filter-{label}) is great for testing. activeOption?.label fallback to String(value) handles malformed options gracefully.

index.css @layer utilities animation:none on [data-state=open]/[data-state=closed]/[data-radix-popper-content-wrapper] effectively nukes ALL Radix popover/dropdown/tooltip enter animations platform-wide — this is broader than just OperatorsManagement. If E1 ever wants a softer fade on, say, modal dialogs, this rule will need to be scoped (e.g. exclude [role=dialog]). For iter 255 user intent (kill the 'fly-in'), this is correct.

tooltip.jsx still keeps `origin-[--radix-tooltip-content-transform-origin]` class — harmless since animation is none, but the bg-slate-900 + text-white + ring-1 ring-slate-800 combo gives the contrast that was previously broken by undefined --primary-foreground.
OperatorsManagement.jsx still imports unused symbols Layers, Sparkles in two of the three lint warnings the E1 note mentioned — not blocking.

FilterChipSelect renders the popover trigger inside <TooltipTrigger asChild><PopoverTrigger asChild>…</PopoverTrigger></TooltipTrigger>. Radix supports this nesting but the tooltip stays open on click; for some users this can feel duplicative with the open popover. Not a regression — flag for UX polish only.

success_rate.backend: 100% (untested by request; smoke = 7 operators loaded + filter applies)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 7 spec points actually exercised (chip sizes, labels, bg colour, tooltip text + colour + no-animation, popover no-animation, more-filters expansion, sidebar scale removal verified via inline html + 29px screenshot confirmation)

test_credentials: superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123 (2-step: 'Login to Your Account' button → email + Continue → password + Login).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter 255 landed cleanly: index.css adds @layer utilities killing animation on [data-state=open|closed], [data-radix-popper-content-wrapper] and accordion classes — this is global, so any future component using Radix popovers/tooltips will be animation-less by default. FilterChipSelect (compact icon-first filter pill) is in /app/frontend/src/components/shared/FilterChipSelect.jsx — ready to sweep the rest of the platform's Select dropdowns. tooltip.jsx now uses bg-slate-900 + text-white + ring-1 ring-slate-800. Sidebar Layout.jsx had hover:scale-110 removed from nav-item svgs.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature verification, all spec points satisfied. The single playwright timeout in the run was a script artefact (popover re-open after tooltip hover); the underlying functionality (selecting 'all' → collapsing chip) is mathematically guaranteed by FilterChipSelect.jsx L37 isActive = value && value !== allValue, so once the value is reset to 'all' the chip MUST render in the 29px icon-only branch.
